name: Moon Phase
description: A full-screen daily lunar display for digital signage - tonight's Moon phase and illumination rendered to the exact hemisphere, with the upcoming New, First Quarter, Full and Last Quarter phases. Location is auto-detected by IP or set per screen.
summary: Tonight's Moon phase and the phases ahead.

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional. Leave unset to auto-detect the screen's location by IP. Sets the hemisphere the Moon is drawn for and the timezone of the dates.
